race_name: Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Cycle Classic
query: Grafton to Inverell Classic gran fondo cycling Grafton to Inverell

videos.title: Australia's most ICONIC Bike Race
videos.description:
Australia's most iconic bike race, the Grafton To Inverell has to also be one of the toughest classic on the calendar. This year I came to defend my title, but I knew I'd have my work cut out for me given the strength of the competition.
 
Chapters
00:00 intro
01:09 Race Tactics
03:26 Big Climb
04:01 Did 1X Work?
05:10 Nutrition Plan 
07:49 Making The Selection 
12:17 Run For Home

Photographers:
https://auriolc.photoshelter.com/index
https://gilfedder.smugmug.com/

Strava: https://www.strava.com/activities/11272425446/segments/3219169977019363398

Become a Nero Show supporter on Patreon: http://tinyurl.com/5fyfcbzb

Grab a Nero Kit: https://nero-club.myshopify.com

SUBSCRIBE On Youtube: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t

The Nero Show is available on your favourite Podcast platform

Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/show/0UEODvANsVqrvSZV5TAqBv

Amazon:
https://music.amazon.com/podcasts/28558e66-2a6b-4ff5-a6bf-709f05b1ffe9

Apple Podcasts:
https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-nero-cycling-show-|-unfiltered-cycling-podcast/id1659229051
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
INSTAGRAM: @chrismiller27 @nerocontinental
TWITTER: @chrismiller @nerocontinental
STRAVA: https://www.strava.com/athletes/186450
Check Out Jesse's Coaching: https://www.nero.club/coaching

videos.title: Squadron Energy Grafton to Inverell Returns for PSL 2026!
videos.transcript:
Another [music]
chapter [music] in the history books.

videos.title: I almost cost us the race
videos.description:
SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/2gMWc1t

Another Grafton to Inverell, this time I experienced it from a very different angle, but it game me a whole new view on not only this race, but racing in general.

Big shout to all the guys in the team who all had a proper rip at the race, especially Sam Hill who as you'll see in the outdo went so deep to try and get a result.

I am very interested in your thoughts on the racing in Australia and my idea that racing needs to be stripped back.

Thanks again 

Chris


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
INSTAGRAM: @chrismiller27 @nerocontinental
TWITTER: @chrismiller @nerocontinental
WEB: www.nerocontinental.com
STRAVA: https://www.strava.com/athletes/186450
BIKE: Devel Project A01 
GROUPSET: FSA WE Groupset
SERVICE & SUPPORT: Cycling Projects Racing
